name: Slimper
short_description: Help Watermelon to climb up to the cable car! Slimper is a hand-drawn precision platform adventure, where your precision and patience will be measured, as one mistake can be a big fall.
detailed_description:
Watermelon fell from a cable car and needs your help to get to the top, a precision platform game that will test your patience and accuracy in the jumps you make. You will have many falls, but it will be part of the process.


  • A challenge for those who like precision platformers, where each jump can be quite a high fall.
  • Automatic saving in each fall.]
  • Meet the flowers that will accompany you along the way and will tell you phrases of encouragement or insults depending on whether you fall or not.
  • Great variety of scenarios, from a sewer to a snowy mountain.
  • Hand-drawn platforms, backgrounds and animations.
  • Several musical pieces for each area of the game.

Controls

The controls are simple and accessible for all ages, you just have to position yourself, get ready and jump, you can control the direction with the keys, as well as wall jumps. For them you will have visual indications that will help you to know the strength of the jump.
